name: Trakt Home Sections
description: Replaces the default Jellyfin home screen with a fully customizable set of rows organized by category. Includes standard Jellyfin sections alongside Trakt-powered rows (watchlist, recommendations, trending, custom lists), Jellyseerr discovery and request sections, and upcoming content from your arr calendars. Requires the File Transformation and Plugin Pages plugins.
overview: Customizable home screen with Trakt, Jellyseerr, and arr integration.
